strengths: Dark colour scheme is consistently applied across all pages creating a premium trades aesthetic
Gold/amber accent colour on CTAs provides strong visual contrast against dark backgrounds
Split-left hero layout is correctly implemented with headline left and visual element right
Typography hierarchy is clear with bold oversized headlines contrasting well against body copy
Services section uses numbered items with clear structure, supporting scannability for trade customers
About page philosophy quote block adds credibility and brand voice consistency
Navigation is clean and uncluttered with a prominent CTA button differentiated from nav links

issues.issue: The right side of the hero shows only a placeholder 'Dynamic' text element with no real imagery — missing a photo of actual carpentry work or team which would dramatically increase trust signals
issues.fix: Replace the placeholder visual with a high-quality photo of completed carpentry work, a job site, or the team — real imagery is critical for trades lead generation

issues.issue: Service items lack visual differentiation — no icons, imagery, or cards to break up the list, making the section feel text-heavy and harder to scan quickly
issues.fix: Add simple trade-relevant icons or a subtle card background to each service item to improve scannability and visual interest

issues.issue: Portfolio/work section images are all broken or not loading, which critically undermines social proof for a trades business where past work is a primary trust factor
issues.fix: Upload and properly link real project photos — this section should showcase 6-9 high quality images of completed jobs as it is central to lead conversion

issues.issue: No visible CTA button in the hero section on the homepage — the primary conversion action is absent from the most valuable real estate on the page
issues.fix: Add a prominent amber CTA button ('Get a Free Quote' or 'Get in Touch') directly beneath the hero headline, above the fold

issues.issue: Body copy appears quite small at mobile-equivalent scale in the screenshots, potentially reducing readability for older tradespeople or homeowner demographics
issues.fix: Increase body font size to minimum 16px and ensure line-height is at least 1.6 for comfortable reading

issues.issue: Only one CTA ('Ready to get started?') appears at the bottom of the homepage — insufficient conversion prompts throughout the page journey
issues.fix: Add a secondary CTA after the services section and ensure each service description links or prompts contact to capture intent at multiple scroll depths

verdict: A well-branded dark trades website with strong colour execution and correct layout structure, but broken portfolio images and a missing hero CTA are significant conversion blockers that must be fixed before launch.
